settings.heading:
Something new is coming —

and it will change the way

women live, age, and thrive.
settings.heading_mobile: Something new is coming — and it will change the way women live, age, and thrive.
settings.paragraph:
Somewhere between doing it all and feeling it all, women in midlife experience a silent shift in hormones, energy, and vitality — that changes more than they realize.

Our research uncovered something hidden in plain sight: a powerful molecule that quietly supports heart health, hormonal balance, and long-term longevity — addressing the #1 threat to women’s health today.

We’ve spent months unlocking its potential.

settings.title: GMO Free

settings.question: Can Berkeley Life be taken with blood pressure or ED medications?
settings.answer: Yes. Berkeley Life is safe and well-tolerated with no known contraindications. However, we recommend speaking with your healthcare provider to ensure the right combination of medication and supplementation.

settings.question: Are there any contraindication to using Berkeley Life?
settings.answer: There are no known contraindications or reported adverse events. A good rule of thumb: if you can eat a leafy green salad, you can take Berkeley Life.

settings.question: Is it safe for people with oxalate sensitivities?
settings.answer: Yes. The oxalate content is extremely low—less than a single spinach leaf. Even individuals with sensitivities generally tolerate it well.

settings.question: Should I talk to my healthcare provider before starting Berkeley Life?
settings.answer: No. Berkeley Life supports nitric oxide production through dietary nitrates instead. L-Arginine works through an enzymatic pathway that is often impaired, so it’s not as reliable.

settings.question: Is Berkeley Life safe for daily use?
settings.answer: Yes. Berkeley Life is manufactured in the United States under FDA-registered, GMP-certified facilities, and undergoes rigorous internal and third-party testing to ensure safety and potency.

settings.question: What quality standards do you follow?
settings.answer: Every ingredient is tested for identity, potency, and microbiological safety before use. Finished products undergo comprehensive quality checks and third-party testing before being released.

settings.question: Can I validate that Berkeley Life is working for me?
settings.answer: Yes. You can use the Nitric Oxide Test Strips before and 90 minutes after taking the supplement to confirm effectiveness.

settings.question: Where is Berkeley Life made?
settings.answer: Supplements are manufactured in the USA, and test strips are produced in Europe.

settings.question: How much should I take daily?
settings.answer: Take two capsules daily with water, preferably after a meal.

settings.question: How long do I need to take Berkeley Life before I see results?
settings.answer: Results vary, some notice a difference right away, while others see benefits after about a month. Consistency is key, and test strips can validate improvements quickly.

settings.question: How long should I continue taking Nitric Oxide support?
settings.answer: Since natural nitric oxide production declines with age, ongoing daily support through diet or supplementation is recommended.

settings.question: What if my test strip doesn’t change color?
settings.answer: If you recently ate or drank, saliva may be diluted, causing a false negative. In rare cases, low oral bacteria levels may impact conversion. We recommend discussing ways to support your oral microbiome with your healthcare provider.

settings.question: How long will it take to get my order?
settings.answer: Orders placed before 2 PM EST ship the same day and typically arrive in 3–7 business days within the US. Canadian orders may take 7–16 days.

settings.question: Do you ship internationally?
settings.answer: We currently ship to the US and Canada. Customers in the UK and Europe can purchase Berkeley Life through our trusted partner, Healf.

settings.question: How do I manage my subscription?
settings.answer: You can manage your subscription by logging into your account. If you have trouble, contact help@berkeleylife.com or call 844-517-1327 (Mon–Fri, 9 AM–5 PM EST).

settings.faq_subtitle: We’ve gathered the most common concerns so you can feel confident starting your Berkeley Life journey.
